catalysts_general: Stock has 10x'd from 52w low ($101.70 → $1064) — parabolic move
Current price ($1,064) is ABOVE mean target ($726) and 93% above median target ($550)
Forward P/E 10x is optically cheap but assumes peak-cycle EPS of $106 is durable
PEG 0.36 — very cheap if growth holds, mathematically misleading if cycle turns
Short interest declining +<5% — bears are covering, not pressing

growth_picks.analyst_take: Micron passes the growth framework 5.5/6, but the price already reflects (and arguably overshoots) the HBM thesis: trading above mean target, +165% in 90 days, and within 1% of 52w high. The cheap forward P/E is a peak-earnings illusion in a notoriously cyclical industry. WATCHLIST — wait for either analyst targets to revise materially higher or a pullback toward $700-$800 before adding.
